channel.name: RouterChannel
channel.description: Version: 0.2.11 Show error message if the mTLS checking filter is disabled.

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptstep.name: mTLS filter disabled guard
pass original headers
redirection

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptrule.name: MTLS-client-cert-validation

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptstep.name: pass headers to destination

channel.preprocessingScript: // Modify the message variable below to pre process data return message;
